DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO ENFORCE ORDER GRANTING MONETARY SANCTIONS. DISCOVERY 302, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE TO PLAINTIFF RE: CONTEMPT (RE COMPLIANCE WITH COURT'S ORDER). DISCUSSED AND THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: THE COURT ORDER TERMINATING SANCTIONS AND DISMISSAL OF CASE BASED ON PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO RESPOND TO PRIOR DISCOVERY REQUESTS AND TO PAY PRIOR SANCTIONS AMOUNT OF $1,500. ALSO, REGARDING THE ADDITIONAL $500 SANCTIONS THAT WERE STAYED, THE COURT LIFTED THE STAY AND IMPOSED THOSE SANCTIONS AS WELL. THEREFORE, A TOTAL OF $2,000 IN SANCTIONS NOW OUTSTANDING. DEFENDANT TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI; NOT REPORTED

CONT. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-25-2011 Off Calendar

Order To Show Cause To Plaintiff Re: Contempt
Off Calendar Jul-18-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE TO PLAINTIFF RE: CONTEMPT (RE COMPLIANCE WITH COURT'S ORDER).

APPEARANCES: Frederick P. Sheinfield, Deputy City Atty 554-3872 for deft CCSF; no other appearances.

RULING: Discussed and the Court ruled as follows: The Court order terminating sanctions and dismissal of case based on plaintiff's failure to respond to prior discovery requests and to pay prior sanctions amount of $1,500. Also, regarding the additional $500 sanctions that were stayed, the Court lifted the stay and imposed those sanctions as well. Therefore, a total of $2,000 in sanctions now outstanding. Defendant to prepare a proposed form of order. Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported

CONT. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-10-2011 Continued To Nov-03-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 610

Notice O Fmotion And Omtion By Deft To Enfroce Order Granting Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-08-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO ENFORCE ORDER GRANTING MONETARY SANCTIONS.

APPEARANCES: Gloria Fortier, 646-5203 pltf & opposing party in propria persona; Frederick P. Sheinfield, Deputy City Atty 554-3872 for deft & moving party.

RULING: Discussed and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as modified: GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. PLAINTIFFS TO PAY DEFENDANT CCSF $1500 BY JULY 15, 2011 5:00PM. Court sets an OSC re contempt hearing for 07/18/11 at 9:00am for compliance with Court's order. Order signed after hearing. Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported

Notice Of Moition By Deft To Compel Responses To Special Interrgoatiries
Off Calendar Jun-08-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS.

APPEARANCES: Gloria Fortier, 646-5203 pltf & opposing party in propria persona; Frederick P. Sheinfield, Deputy City Atty 554-3872 for deft & moving party.

RULING: Discussed and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as modified: GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. PLAINTIFFS TO PAY DEFENDANT CCSF $500 IN SANCTIONS, however Court stayed payment pending plaintiff providing responses. If responses provided, Court will not issue $500 sanctions. All responses due by 07/15/11 at 5:00pm. Court sets an OSC re contempt hearing for 07/18/11 at 9:00am for compliance with Court's order. Order signed after hearing. Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported

CONT. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFFS' DEPOSITIONS AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS.

APPEARANCES: Gloria Fortier, 646-5203 pltf & opposing party in propria persona (did not comply with the tentative ruling rule re giving proper notice to opposing party of her intent to appear at the hearing); Kimberly A. Bliss, Deputy City Atty 554-3861 for deft & moving party.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. DEFENDANT TO RECOVER $1,000.00 IN REASONABLE SANCTIONS. Order signed in open court. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Not reported
